scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names API,MOBILE --prefix-colors magenta,blue "npm run api" "npm run web"
scripts.api: cd apps/api && DONE_STT_ENABLED=true uv run uvicorn app.main:app --env-file ../../.env --reload --port 8001
scripts.api:production: cd apps/api && DONE_STT_ENABLED=true DONE_DEMO_FAILURES_ENABLED=false DONE_DEMO_ENDPOINTS_ENABLED=false uv run uvicorn app.main:app --env-file ../../.env --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --workers 1
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check app tests
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:mobile && npm run test:api
